ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "invoice_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the invoice */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the transaction */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch where the transaction occurred */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the branch is located */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product sold */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "cost" REAL /* Total cost of the product before tax */,
  "tax_5_percent" REAL /* Tax amount (5%) */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the product including tax */,
  "payment_mode" INTEGER /* Payment method used (e.g., Credit Card, Cash) */,
  "gross_income" REAL /* Gross income from the transaction */,
  "gross_margin_percentage" REAL /* Gross margin percentage */,
  "rating" REAL /* Customer rating for the transaction */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee who handled the transaction */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount applied */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of discount applied */,
  "is_return" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the transaction is a return */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for return (if applicable) */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of return (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_payment_mode FOREIGN KEY ("payment_mode") REFERENCES payment_modes ("payment_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the branch is located */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the branch */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the branch opened */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date the branch closed (if applicable) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the branch */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the branch */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the branch */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_branches_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "customer_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer type */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender type */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined (if a member) */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "preferred_product_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the preferred product line of the customer */,
  "marketing_opt_in" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the customer opts in for marketing communications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_preferred_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES gender_types ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_customer_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_type_id") REFERENCES customer_types ("customer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product line */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for restocking the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "is_discontinued" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the product is discontinued */,
  "discount_eligible" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the product is eligible for discounts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "product_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product line */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product line */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image representing the product line */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the product line is featured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_lines_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_modes" (
  "payment_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment mode */,
  "payment_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment mode (e.g., Credit Card, Cash) */,
  "is_online" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the payment mode is online */,
  "processing_fee" REAL /* Processing fee for the payment mode */,
  "max_transaction_limit" REAL /* Maximum transaction limit for the payment mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_types" (
  "customer_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer type */,
  "customer_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer type (e.g., Normal, Member) */,
  "discount_rate" REAL /* Discount rate for the customer type */,
  "loyalty_program" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program for the customer type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gender_types" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender type */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender type (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product line */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the analytics record */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount */,
  "total_quantity" INTEGER /* Total quantity sold */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average customer rating */,
  "gross_income" REAL /* Total gross income */,
  "gross_margin_percentage" REAL /* Average gross margin percentage */,
  "total_discount_amount" REAL /* Total discount amount */,
  "total_discount_percentage" REAL /* Total discount percentage */,
  "total_returns" INTEGER /* Total number of returns */,
  "average_return_amount" REAL /* Average return amount */,
  "top_selling_product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the top-selling product */,
  "top_selling_product_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the top-selling product */,
  "customer_satisfaction_score" REAL /* Customer satisfaction score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_analytics_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_analytics_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_analytics_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_analytics_top_selling_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("top_selling_product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch where the employee works */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the manufacturer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
